header_title.description: Magaca app-ka oo lagu muujiyey madaxa. App-ka helitaanka cuntooyinka dhaqamada adduunka.

header_subtitle.text: Soo hel cuntooyin ka kala socda adduunka oo dhan
header_subtitle.description: Qoraalka hoos yimaada magaca app-ka ee madaxa.

home_page_hero_title.description: Cinwaanka ugu weyn ee qeybta hero-ga bogga hore.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Kusoo dhex soco cuntooyin dhab ah oo ka yimid jikada adduunka oo dhan
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Qoraalka hoos yimaada cinwaanka hero-ga ee bogga hore.

home_page_featured_title.description: Cinwaanka qeybta oo ka sarreeya shabakadda kaararka cuntada.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Summada waqtiga karinta ee kaarka cuntada. {minutes} waxa lagu beddelaa tirada daqiiqadaha.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Summada ka hor heerka adkaanta ee kaarka cuntada.

recipe_card_easy.description: Summada heerka adkaanta oo muujinaysa cunto fudud.

recipe_card_medium.description: Summada heerka adkaanta oo muujinaysa cunto dhexdhexaad adag.

recipe_card_hard.description: Summada heerka adkaanta oo muujinaysa cunto adag.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Maraq lafaha doofaarka hodan ah oo leh chashu jilicsan, ukun si fiican loo kariyey, iyo baasto cusub.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza Neapolitan classic ah oo leh yaanyo San Marzano, mozzarella cusub, iyo basil.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Magaca cunto karinta Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos doofaar marinad leh oo leh canab, cilantro, iyo basal ku yaal tortillas galleyda.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Sharaxaadda cunto karinta Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Magaca cunto karinta Digaag Subag leh.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Digaag jilicsan oo ku jira maraq yaanyo iyo subag leh oo leh dhir udgoon.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Sharaxaadda cunto karinta Digaag Subag leh.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Baasto bariis shiilan oo leh shrimp, tofu, laws, iyo maraq tamarind ah.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Krebs khafiif ah oo jilicsan oo buuxda leh Nutella, strawberries cusub, iyo kareem la garaacay.
